name: Claire's Precious Little Life: The Mid Days - Alice's door
description:
Hello everyone! Guess who's back with another bot? That's right! MBD is!
I decided to make it a pretty big bot filled a bunch of characters.

The personality was made by me!

The first message was written by @kassyfrl_ !
(Click here for a link to their account!!!)
_

Me reading the footnote at the end of the first message:

If you hear something about a basement, no you don’t…

______________________________________

This has a total of 4300+ tokens, so if it breaks: please tell me!

________________________________________

Me about to make a bot and getting distracted:

___________
First episode of Claire's precious little life: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=NXck2l0wUMI

Second episode of Claire's precious little life (The one this bot is based off of!):https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=30oR6yrI0dY
creator: DoktorZiggy
